subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! I beseech Thee by the light of Thy glory which hath encompassed Thy Kingdom and Thy dominion, and by which all are drawn unto Thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی اسئلک بنور بهائک الذی احاط ملکوتک و جبروتک و انجذبت به
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @suffering and imprisonment
